interactionClass.name: FederationJoined
interactionClass.semantics: This interaction is sent when a federate joins the federation execution. For synchronization purposes

interactionClass.name: IncomingToken
interactionClass.semantics: Represents the Token, as specified in the BPMN execution semantics, which is exchanged between two flow nodes provided by two different federates

parameter.name: tokenTargetEntity
parameter.semantics: Participant that contains the FlowNode that handles the incoming token

parameter.name: tokenTargetNode
parameter.semantics: FlowNode responsible for receiving and processing the incoming token

parameter.name: startTime
parameter.semantics: token creation time expressed in the simulation logical time

interactionClass.name: IncomingMessage
interactionClass.semantics: Represents a message exchanged between two flow nodes provided by two different federates

parameter.name: messageSourceEntity
parameter.semantics: Participant that contains the FlowNode that sends message

parameter.name: messageTargetEntity
parameter.semantics: Participant that contains the FlowNode that receives the incoming message

parameter.name: messageTargetNode
parameter.semantics: Flow Node responsible for receiving and processing the incoming message

synchronizationPoint.label: READY_TO_RUN
synchronizationPoint.semantics: Sync point achieved when a federate joins the federation and completes the HLA initialization
